text:
Once upon a time, there was a sleepy old man named Specs.

 Specs owned a little bakery downtown. Even though he rarely slept.

One moonlit night, Specs wandered past his oven. Something sparkled inside.

 Specs peered closer. A butterfly.

 Specs captured it. Well, sort of.

 Specs put the butterfly into a silk balloon.

 Specs floated downtown all night. People stopped and stared.

 Specs finally landed on Specs' own doorstep.

 Specs woke up hungry.

 Specs bit into ice cream.

 Specs hadn't eaten anything overnight.

 Specs looked at the butterfly.

 Specs felt sleepy.

 Specs drifted off.

The next morning Specs woke up on his bed.

 Specs searched everywhere but couldn't find his butterfly.

 Specs just stared at his empty balloon.

 Specs wanted another butterfly.

 Specs didn't think.

 Specs bought another.

 Specs tied them together. But they flew off together.

And Specs learned something.

Sometimes you just want something special.

And sometimes it flies away. But then again.

 maybe that's just
